title: brain validate [<note>] — --json success output
description: Deterministic validation report over a note or the whole vault — a thin read-only wrapper over the validation owner (Task 4.4): schema/path/identity-namespace/provenance/accessibility checks, dangling id detection, reserved-operation rejection, and the tier2Eligible gate. Read-only: writes no sink and no audit-ref event. Exit 0 when clean; exit 1 when findings are present.

ok.description: true ⇒ no blocking findings (exit 0); false ⇒ findings present (exit 1).

scope.description: The validated note id, or 'vault' for a whole-vault pass.

gates.description: The Tier-2 eligibility gate PLUS the two independently-typed confidence inputs the workflow gates on (acceptance-thresholds.md §workflow). Both confidences are always reported so a downstream Tier-2 decision can never be made with either input absent; tier2Eligible is true only when min(modelConfidence, validationConfidence) >= 0.8 AND evidence is valid AND input is trusted.

tier2Eligible.description: Whether the validated plan/note is eligible for Tier-2 auto-commit (either confidence < 0.8, non-valid evidence, or untrusted input ⇒ false).

modelConfidence.description: The generation model's self-reported confidence carried on the plan (acceptance-thresholds.md §workflow modelConfidence).

validationConfidence.description: The deterministic validator's own confidence that the plan is grounded, schema-valid, and evidence-anchored (acceptance-thresholds.md §workflow validationConfidence).

x-atlas-contract.summary: Deterministic validation report (thin wrapper over the Task 4.4 owner); exit 1 when findings present.

args.description: Note id to validate; omitted ⇒ whole-vault pass.

errorCodes.when: one or more blocking findings are present (ok=false)
the vault repo is missing or unreadable, or the note does not exist
